entities.description: bookrag is a product that significantly outperforms existing baselines in solving complex document qa tasks
existing baselines are the current methods or systems that bookrag outperforms in the experiments
complex document qa tasks are the specific problems that bookrag is designed to solve
extensive experiments are the tests conducted to evaluate the performance of bookrag
multiple benchmarks are the evaluation standards used in the experiments to measure performance
state of the art performance is the high level of achievement attained by bookrag in the tasks
competitive efficiency is a metric indicating that bookrag maintains good efficiency while performing well

relations.description: bookrag significantly outperforms existing baselines in experiments
bookrag attains state of the art performance in solving complex document qa tasks
extensive experiments were performed on bookrag to demonstrate its capabilities
extensive experiments were conducted on multiple benchmarks to validate results
bookrag attained state of the art performance as a result of the experiments
bookrag maintained competitive efficiency while solving tasks
the performance on multiple benchmarks showed state of the art results
